mapper.insert: insert into lego_models (id, name, description, provider, model_key, config, api_key_cipher, base_url) values (#{id}, #{name}, #{description}, #{provider}, #{modelKey}, cast(#{configJson} as jsonb), #{apiKeyCipher}, #{baseUrl})
mapper.select: select id, name, description, provider, model_key, cast(config as text) as config_json, api_key_cipher, base_url, created_at from lego_models where id = #{id}
select id, name, description, provider, model_key, cast(config as text) as config_json, api_key_cipher, base_url, created_at from lego_models order by created_at desc
mapper.update: update lego_models set name = #{name}, description = #{description}, model_key = #{modelKey}, config = cast(#{configJson} as jsonb), api_key_cipher = #{apiKeyCipher}, base_url = #{baseUrl} where id = #{id}
